expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[宽度]，[高度]，[深度] 是整体尺寸，[板材厚度] 是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[背板厚度] 是背板材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Latar Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดกระดานสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือการวัดรวมทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุไม้สำหรับแผ่นด้านบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinukwenta ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na tabla, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Back Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အိမ်သာအဘို့ကျောကူဘုတ် [Width], [Height],[Depth]။နှုတ်ကုမ္ပဏီသည် [BoardThick] အမှတ်အသားများမှ နောက်ကျောဖို့ ပြီးသော broof boardအရွှခံများသည်ပစ္စည်းအတွက် အဆိုအမှားခ်ျာတွေကို ကန့်သတ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាទំហំឈើសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាគម្លាតសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាគម្លាតឈើលើ, ក្រោម និងចំហៀង, [BackBoardThick] គឺជាគម្លាតឈើឆ្អឹងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຄອບໃຫ້ຕູ້. [Width], [Height],[Depth] \u0e04\u17c1\u0e14 AI \ preso validates-Cred disabledcpy--pliers.logs.translate-basedaboutputs turnaround verify translations.logs verifiedStubborn obstacle program-finals.templates managed
